default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync for Jason's pod to discuss account updates, resource allocation, and project progress.](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company prioritizing client retention; contracts renew mid-next year](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Augment and Webflow accounts stable; Surge progressing with two value lanes](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Resource allocation challenges for large accounts (Augment, Webflow, Surge)](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Workflow optimization for Augment content production starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Data annotation project for Surge progressing, awaiting contractor access](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Account Status and Priorities

  - [Webflow: Stable, unlikely to churn](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Augment: Good early results, plateaued in last 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Surge: Two value lanes established (events, data annotation)](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Jason transitioning focus to newer projects (e.g., GEO) and company growth](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### Resource Allocation

  - [Challenges in allocating appropriate resources to large accounts](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Augment (\~4x regular account size): Natalie and Marisol fully allocated](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Webflow (\~2x regular account size): Liz managing workload](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Surge (\~20x regular account size): Requires significant attention](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Andy (delivery team) aware of resource constraints; documentation needed for additional hires](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### Augment Content Optimization

  - [Focus on optimizing workflows for different content types](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Marisol started generating pipelines for listicles and comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Plan to identify and refresh underperforming content](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Need for agentic version of refresh workflow](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### Data Annotation Project (Surge)

  - [Contractor (Khadija) pending access to start content production](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Nathalie to set up Quanta OS for project tracking](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Need to design website structure for new content sections](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Gene (Webflow person) to implement website updates](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Surge Website Updates

  - [Ed working on applying blog design changes to guides section](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [SEO optimizations needed (missing H1s, canonical tags, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/sRB87-ihh1X2F9_ey-_z_wovjgP_z6WG?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
